summary: Sprint 2 implementation plan for Patient Management module. Covers backend DTO creation with class-validator, service improvements (soft delete, email search), controller DTO typing. Frontend: patients list with real API integration, debounced search, pagination, loading/empty states; patient add/edit modal with form validation and toast notifications; patient detail page with tabs for appointments, notes; plus CSS additions for modals, toasts, tabs, and pagination. Verification via TypeScript compilation, dev server test, and browser-based manual testing.
